name: svelterm
description: Svelte 5 components rendered to the terminal with real CSS

scripts.demo: DEMO=${DEMO:-counter} npx vite build && node dist-demo/${DEMO:-counter}/main.js
scripts.demo:counter: DEMO=counter npx vite build && node dist-demo/counter/main.js
scripts.demo:dashboard: DEMO=dashboard npx vite build && node dist-demo/dashboard/main.js
scripts.demo:todo: DEMO=todo npx vite build && node dist-demo/todo/main.js
scripts.demo:showcase: DEMO=showcase npx vite build && node dist-demo/showcase/main.js
scripts.demo:keyboard-hero: DEMO=keyboard-hero npx vite build && node dist-demo/keyboard-hero/main.js
scripts.demo:snake: DEMO=snake npx vite build && node dist-demo/snake/main.js
scripts.demo:themes: DEMO=themes npx vite build && node dist-demo/themes/main.js
